opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lab results came back on my phone saying my immune system is failing, and now I feel incredibly shaky and feverish.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I got an automated message this evening about my blood test showing my white cells are low, and I'm terrified I'm getting a serious infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, shortly after I opened my blood test results on my phone
symptom_narrative.duration: it built up over about two hours and I still feel it
symptom_narrative.character: shaky and trembly, cold shivery chills, a bit sweaty, my heart pounding, and I can't stop feeling something is badly wrong
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel awful and really frightened, like I might be very ill
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — the shaking and chills, and my heart racing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty constant since it started, and it spikes when I re-read the result
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; my spouse trying to reassure me helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: looking at the result again on my phone and reading online about low white cells
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: palpitations and feeling hot then cold; no cough, no sore throat, no pain anywhere
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've worried a lot about my health before, but I've never felt this wound-up
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't settle or sleep and it's really upsetting my spouse too

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I tend to get very anxious about my health

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a spouse who is present and worried; describes themselves as someone who worries about their health and checks results on a phone app

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch is showing a heart rate around 100 to 105
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading taken while very anxious on a consumer smartwatch, not a medical device

objective_data_offered.value: my spouse says I look pale and sweaty and am visibly trembling
